Dear supporters, This morning, Senator Sanders suspended his campaign for President, saying "Let us go forward together, our struggle continues." In 1986, when I was a little girl getting by on food stamps, I knew that Bernie was fighting for me. Thirty years later, when he ran for president, I knew that he was fighting for my kids. When the '16 campaign ended, he urged progressives to run for office, and that's why I'm here, in this race today. Bernie showed the world what was possible for a people powered movement and a campaign financed without the corruption of corporate money. The political revolution lives on in our campaign, and hundreds of others around the country. Our fight for Medicare for All, a fracking ban, free public college, student and medical debt cancellation, closing the migrant detention camps, and more continues in the final weeks of this primary election. We need your voice, energy, time, and money on this campaign now more than ever. To all my Bernie supporters, take what time you need to process, and then jump into this fight with both feet. We need you. Calling. Texting. Social Media. Postcards. Yard Signs. Our momentum for #NotMeUs in Oregon is not going anywhere. Stay well, stay home, and stay in touch. Onward, Doyle

**STUDENTS FOR CANNING LIVESTREAM** Join our coalition of student fellows, volunteers, and fans of Doyle in a livestream centered around issues facing young people. We will discuss the reasons why we are in this fight in general, and why we have specifically chosen to support Doyle for Congress. **This Saturday Night!**

|

**COFFEE WITH CANNING \- SUNDAYS** Join Doyle every Sunday morning at 10am for a cup of coffee and a chat about the issues that matter to you most! Because she can't meet you in person, Doyle wants to make sure everyone knows she is always available to the voters, and this is the perfect time to get connected!

**YES WE CAN...**
---
|
---
**WE GOT THIS!!** With all of the uncertainty and negativity going around lately, it is tough to remain positive. Especially when the biggest progressive role model of our generation exited the race. However, now is the time to fight even harder. This movement has always been about every single one of us, and the fight has just begun. Now more than ever we need to see Doyle in D.C., so do not give up hope. We got this.
---
|

Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! This movement has always been about every single one of us, and the fight has just begun. Now more than ever we need to see Doyle in D.C., so do not give up hope. We got this. | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Steve Chabot
subject: Helping Small Businesses
body:
Our nation's backbone No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Helping Small Businesses](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-j/)
The coronavirus crisis has affected all of our lives in so many ways. Palm Sunday was just three days ago, and Easter is just four days ahead. Yet America's churches are all but empty. America's small businesses would normally be busy and thriving, but a significant number of them are shuttered. In this week's blog, I review three pieces of legislation Congress has recently passed to help small businesses, the backbone of our great nation. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The Largest Rescue Package in American History](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-d/)
In this week's blog, I discuss the CARES Act (The Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic Security Act) which the President signed into law over the weekend. You may be interested to learn who will benefit from this $2.2 trillion bill, perhaps even you and your family. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Everything Will Be Okay](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-u/)
In this week's blog post, I discuss an encouraging initiative in a Georgia community to help local artists and lift everyone's spirits during these trying times. I also discuss recent legislation to alleviate the coronavirus crisis including the Senate's multitrillion-dollar coronavirus response package agreed upon late last night. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Coronavirus](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-n/)
Coronavirus (COVID-19) is on everyone's mind. In fact, the first three cases of Coronavirus have been confirmed in Ohio. In this week's blog I discuss this ongoing challenge, what steps have been taken from the executive and legislative level, and finally offer some words of hope and encouragement. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkytkjk-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Show your support for Medicare for All
body:
Peter,

There’s a reason why health insurance shouldn’t be tied to your employer. There’s a reason why comprehensive care should be free and accessible for all. And there’s a reason why pharmaceutical companies shouldn’t get to dictate the cost of prescription drug prices.

The reason? Healthcare is a right, and not just in a pandemic. But the COVID-19 outbreak is further proof that our healthcare system is broken, and that Medicare for All is the only way forward. If you agree, will you sign this petition today? https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-if-you-agree-we-need-congress-to-pass-medicare-for-all-now-more-than-ever?source=20200326_MedicareForAll_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabm4a

ADD YOUR NAME: SUPPORT MEDICARE FOR ALL https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-if-you-agree-we-need-congress-to-pass-medicare-for-all-now-more-than-ever?source=20200326_MedicareForAll_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabm4a

This pandemic hasn’t just created new problems -- it’s exposed long-standing inequalities in our society, from access to safe housing to fresh food to a living wage. And the same can be said for our healthcare system: While this crisis has created unprecedented challenges for our hospitals and healthcare workers, it’s also shining a light on the obstacles so many Americans regularly face when seeking the care they need.

We should have passed Medicare for All long ago. We have absolutely no excuse not to pass it now. So if you’re ready to join me in the fight for our healthcare, sign this petition today and show your support for Medicare for All. https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-if-you-agree-we-need-congress-to-pass-medicare-for-all-now-more-than-ever?source=20200326_MedicareForAll_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabm4a

Best,
Adem

SIGN HERE TODAY https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-if-you-agree-we-need-congress-to-pass-medicare-for-all-now-more-than-ever?source=20200326_MedicareForAll_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabm4a

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: This is what corruption looks like
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s_uo1nVrULxrmCXS5sdcO_AucnaCrAa4I6hv9s0r4l-Zny4BligJkYiEfKi48z9fWr98qKwMp_78MdlH2jyfs97oMT9dia8fbXhJomc66GUdfl2Kt80djLlio31Omk8UZ26X64muxn-V_kxawwzLrK8iBgMVnTOLp-BcUCOcumxFVjUq-qpxfIAtp-XRdDGjh1MPssIyeIs=&c=m4Z5a1kO8JG5ZOJQPF-K_eI8uekHJWvpboK6ns-5GKrNfKhWL5ZPtA==&ch=CUo4fRB29KkNEOBmHxyPeCZVXwj-EtuPxF3ILjDEBlTE0AKyiLAVaQ==)
---
| Patriot,
We're going through a very tough time. Millions of Americans are hurting financially as businesses have had to close and the global economy has slowed almost to a halt.
Wouldn't it have been nice if you had a tip back in early February that the coronavirus was more serious than we thought, and that it would have a huge negative effect on the stock market?
Sen. Richard Burr had that tip, but instead of relaying the information to the American public, he sold off his stocks to save his portfolio and then wrote an op-ed reassuring our citizens that the virus was no big deal.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s_uo1nVrULxrmCXS5sdcO_AucnaCrAa4I6hv9s0r4l-Zny4BligJkYiEfKi48z9fWr98qKwMp_78MdlH2jyfs97oMT9dia8fbXhJomc66GUdfl2Kt80djLlio31Omk8UZ26X64muxn-V_kxawwzLrK8iBgMVnTOLp-BcUCOcumxFVjUq-qpxfIAtp-XRdDGjh1MPssIyeIs=&c=m4Z5a1kO8JG5ZOJQPF-K_eI8uekHJWvpboK6ns-5GKrNfKhWL5ZPtA==&ch=CUo4fRB29KkNEOBmHxyPeCZVXwj-EtuPxF3ILjDEBlTE0AKyiLAVaQ==)
---
| It is completely unacceptable that Sen. Burr would sit on important information just to profit off it. We cannot let the Washington Elite cover for this type of behavior. It's time to hold Sen. Burr accountable for his actions.
---
| | | [SIGN YOUR NAME. END THE CORRUPTION](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s_uo1nVrULxrmCXS5sdcO_AucnaCrAa4I6hv9s0r4l-Zny4BligJkYiEfKi48z9fWr98qKwMp_78MdlH2jyfs97oMT9dia8fbXhJomc66GUdfl2Kt80djLlio31Omk8UZ26X64muxn-V_kxawwzLrK8iBgMVnTOLp-BcUCOcumxFVjUq-qpxfIAtp-XRdDGjh1MPssIyeIs=&c=m4Z5a1kO8JG5ZOJQPF-K_eI8uekHJWvpboK6ns-5GKrNfKhWL5ZPtA==&ch=CUo4fRB29KkNEOBmHxyPeCZVXwj-EtuPxF3ILjDEBlTE0AKyiLAVaQ==)
---
| There is a reason we call Washington D.C. "The Swamp." It's because behavior like this happens all the time. It's our duty as Trump Republicans to root out this corruption in Washington, especially when it is coming from our own party.
---
| | | [DRAIN THE SWAMP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s_uo1nVrULxrmCXS5sdcO_AucnaCrAa4I6hv9s0r4l-Zny4BligJkYiEfKi48z9fWr98qKwMp_78MdlH2jyfs97oMT9dia8fbXhJomc66GUdfl2Kt80djLlio31Omk8UZ26X64muxn-V_kxawwzLrK8iBgMVnTOLp-BcUCOcumxFVjUq-qpxfIAtp-XRdDGjh1MPssIyeIs=&c=m4Z5a1kO8JG5ZOJQPF-K_eI8uekHJWvpboK6ns-5GKrNfKhWL5ZPtA==&ch=CUo4fRB29KkNEOBmHxyPeCZVXwj-EtuPxF3ILjDEBlTE0AKyiLAVaQ==)

| God bless America,
---
|

| Matt Gaetz

It's our duty as Trump Republicans to root out this corruption in Washington, especially when it is coming from our own party. | | | == | God bless America, | | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2020 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Republican Response Updates
subject: President Trump wants to Drain the Swamp-are you in?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
We are calling on Republicans nationwide to stand with President Trump in his fight to Drain the Swamp. When Donald Trump ran in 2016, his message was very clear: end overbearing government bureaucracy and cut the red tape. Four years later, the radical left is fighting harder than ever to break the levy and let the Swamp flood back into Washington.
Friend,

We are calling on Republicans nationwide to stand with President Trump in his fight to Drain the Swamp. When Donald Trump ran in 2016, his message was very clear: _**end overbearing government bureaucracy and cut the red tape. Four years later, the radical left is fighting harder than ever to break the levy and let the Swamp flood back into Washington.**_

And when President Trump called on a strong leader to help him in his effort to rid Washington of dangerous government bureaucracy, Senator Todd Young (R-IN) answered the call. _**Todd has worked hand in hand with the President to promote America-first policies that put the power back into the hands of everyday Americans.
**_

name: Jason Yates
subject: Join Us - 100 Days of Intentional Faith
body:
Peter,
This challenging moment in our country calls every Christian to press deeply into our faith.
It’s an opportunity for the church to emerge with a strengthened and more intentional faith. It’s a chance for us to reimagine who we are as the church, and how we can be known differently in America because of our faith.
I’ve been having conversations with my good friend, Pastor Allen Jackson, and he has put together a free life-changing resource for you to help bring clarity to our present crisis by intentionally drawing near to the Lord.
**We invite you to join us on a journey of 100 Days of Faith through a free daily email.** You can sign up here: [https://myfaithvotes.org/100-days-of-faith](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUgfmqqiblShd8BOF6VHCipfhPJfL5t5vjiAGocbSJ4o&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200409com01&n=1).
By participating in this email series that comes to your inbox each morning, Pastor Jackson provides short videos or written devotions to support you in staying the course.
**Together we will explore what it means to grow spiritually, ways to begin to pray, what it looks like to honor God at home, with our families, and through our work.**
**If we walk together for 100 days, we will establish new habits and set into motion a routine that will impact our future.**
I hope you’ll accept our challenge to join us on a powerful journey of 100 Days of Faith.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUgfmqqiblShd8BOF6VHCipfhPJfL5t5vjiAGocbSJ4o&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200409com01&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200409com01&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200409com01&n=4).

Keeping SC Safe | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace.org/send-a-trump-ally-to-congress-1921557?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=276a0372c9&e=f1831b4ca2)

| | Friends,
**Did you see[my piece in the Post & Courier](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=95b30f04a8&e=f1831b4ca2)? **

I got home from Columbia last night where we had an emergency session to fund state government to get us through the COVID-19 crisis.

Throughout this chaotic time while we're all homeschooling, Zoom'ing, conference calling, and more, I'm working hard to draw attention to the **__absolute need for rapid testing__.**

This testing will help our state get back on track. The testing will tell you in less than 15 minutes one of three things:
1. Do you have COVID-19 right now?
2. Are you asymptomatic but have COVID-19 and don't know it, possibly infecting those around you?
3. Have you previously had COVID-19 and now have some protection against getting it again? This is especially helpful to our frontline nurses, doctors, first responders, LE, grocery store workers, truck or delivery drivers, and to those who want to get back to work.

[Click Here to Read My Piece](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f47881b1a2&e=f1831b4ca2)

| Working hard for you, I'm here to help.

Sincerely,

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Sign my petition to demand the 2020 election be vote by mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello — The coronavirus outbreak is forcing all Americans to adapt to new at-home routines, from YouTube workouts to conference calls, home schooling, and video chats with our friends across the street and across the country. **Our democracy is no different. Every eligible voter should be able to make their voice heard in our elections without facing the long lines, crowds, and health risks of in-person polling places. ** Now is the time to recognize the impact this pandemic is having on our elections and democracy, and come together to address it before it’s too late: [**If you agree, sign my urgent petition demanding President Trump and Congress work together to ensure that every American can vote by mail in the 2020 election and beyond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17072200/182005636/-1165564192?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2FmNmJlNS04YjdhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TFrHxvrKqFWwH_ETm5C9TiHsMGeCHXgBlR0PdNFjqQw=&emci=f0af6be5-8b7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f3af6be5-8b7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=7280715) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17072201/182005637/-1165564192?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2FmNmJlNS04YjdhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TFrHxvrKqFWwH_ETm5C9TiHsMGeCHXgBlR0PdNFjqQw=&emci=f0af6be5-8b7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f3af6be5-8b7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=7280715)
---
If you saw what happened in Wisconsin’s elections on Tuesday, you saw a system that was fundamentally flawed.
Local election officials and volunteers, typically seniors, were desperately hunting down sanitizer while hundreds of polling places were closed due to health concerns — but Republicans still fought tooth and nail to stop Wisconsin’s Governor Evers from postponing the election to protect the public’s health.
_It was sheer chaos! _
There’s got to be a better way to protect public health and our democracy. And in fact, we’ve already found one here in Colorado where we’ve been voting from home by mail for the last few years.
[**It’s time to bring that system nationwide and use Colorado as a model for our country once again. Sign my petition if you agree we need vote by mail in every state for the 2020 elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17072202/182005638/-1165564192?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2FmNmJlNS04YjdhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TFrHxvrKqFWwH_ETm5C9TiHsMGeCHXgBlR0PdNFjqQw=&emci=f0af6be5-8b7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f3af6be5-8b7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=7280715)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17072203/182005639/-1165564192?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2FmNmJlNS04YjdhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TFrHxvrKqFWwH_ETm5C9TiHsMGeCHXgBlR0PdNFjqQw=&emci=f0af6be5-8b7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f3af6be5-8b7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=7280715)
---
Universal vote at home reform is simply common sense. Unfortunately, common sense does not prevail very often in Washington. To that I say: it’s time we make Washington a little more like Colorado. We’ve proven that vote at home reforms work, so why not expand them to the rest of the United States?
Our democracy and our public health are too important for anything less.
Thanks for taking action to protect our elections.
— John Hickenlooper
Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---
Hickenlooper for Colorado
PO Box 18886
Denver, CO 80218
United States
[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f0af6be5-8b7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8/f3af6be5-8b7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2FmNmJlNS04YjdhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TFrHxvrKqFWwH_ETm5C9TiHsMGeCHXgBlR0PdNFjqQw=&id=109201661&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: Amend Gov. Abbott’s Executive Order
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XcTn4bseJtPTpMTVJp46tm59D8UUlY1ZrcEBBVEUhmM=/GGXAzTBt__Dynh0bqjUFlwVRV1as4E8xaP5gB6Ctpg8=)
---
| Folks, As the grandson of a preacher, I know how important worship is, especially in times of crisis and uncertainty. That's why I thank all religious leaders and worshippers who are practicing social distancing and reducing public contact by worshipping outside of their usual places of worship. **Recently, Texas Governor Greg Abbott issued an executive order choosing to protect those who attend schools by limiting access to schools, but not those who attend worship.** He chose to protect educators and children who attend school, but failed to protect worshippers by temporarily limiting access to places of worship. Places of worship have experienced COVID-19 outbreaks in South Korea, Alabama, and Washington, DC. Right now, we need to be doing everything we can to prevent social gatherings and reduce public contact. Drastic action is the only way to slow the spread of this virus, keep our healthcare system from becoming overburdened, and save lives. **That 's why I continue to call on Governor Abbott to amend his executive order and temporarily limit access to places of worship.** Limiting access to places of worship does not prevent worshippers from worshipping -- but it can prevent viral spread and save lives. I will continue to do everything I can to protect Americans' health and wellbeing throughout this crisis. Sometimes that may mean standing alone -- but I do so knowing it's better to stand alone than not stand at all. \-- Congressman Al Green
---
* * *
| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/XcTn4bseJtPTpMTVJp46tm59D8UUlY1ZrcEBBVEUhmM=/PVgNF84_ovidXwmKhCATzUgwHqTI8RoXu3ea6VAN23w=) here.

| Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
---

Houston TX 77256-6761 United States

name: Blue Georgia
subject: Stacey Abrams is ALL IN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
If you believe in the future we're fighting for, we need you to answer just one question before 11:59 p.m. tonight, but we're still missing your response:
| | | Have you heard, friend?
---
**Stacey Abrams - former Democratic nominee for governor of Georgia - has endorsed our campaign for U.S. Senate!**
When Stacey ran for governor back in 2018, the strength of her grassroots movement was _undeniable_. It was a wake-up call for Democrats across this country: Georgia was winnable _ _ and ready for change.

But the Republicans' systematic voter suppression stripped tens of thousands of people of their right to vote - and history will repeat itself unless we elect a leader who's committed to representing all Georgians, not just a lucky few.
That's why Stacey is ALL IN with Reverend Warnock in this fight to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and elect the first black senator this state has _ _ ever seen. But we won't win without you, friend.

**If you believe in the future we're fighting for - one in which every single voice deserves to be heard - we need you to ****answer just one question before 11:59 p.m. tonight, but we're still missing your response:**
| | **Do you stand with Stacey Abrams in the fight to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate? **
---

name: Maya Handa
subject: One hour to help us win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
I am so excited by all the progress we’ve made since I joined Mondaire’s team a few weeks ago. We’ve hired two digital organizers, held dozens of volunteer trainings and phone banks, built our communities on Slack and Zoom, and made thousands of calls | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CgE/ni0YAA/t.30s/dOL8WdRvSL-5n0cwcaGwwA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNL3iNtYr2M93i1m9J73r1PfewBNrLzQNZtPquD7Ua-2Bk6TjuLT3Nk94jdBdRRG-2BXHAdWTvHXptrha95SxEyjVEY-2BWziSkWIXVVp0ptmXOGwMrqp0doTxZ-2BGSrBrR-2F5ui99GDbQnGgcAMeXpkdmmTqKwBqdablIgxmWXT-2F6MOmdvu4GqHNWSahH9WsBsPCO8Hz-2FfLJf3zGdeEouSiZxS-2BLt5cjkoXZAORD6NBJlQ4-2FXUhiA-3D-3D/PIyI) Friend, **** **** **** I am so excited by all the progress we’ve made since I joined Mondaire’s team a few weeks ago. We’ve hired two digital organizers, held dozens of volunteer trainings and phone banks, built our communities on Slack and Zoom, and made thousands of calls and texts to voters.
This is hard to believe, but we are less than 11 weeks away from the election on June 23rd. We are ramping up our digital organizing fast, but we need even more volunteers making calls, sending texts, and telling their friends and family why they’re supporting Mondaire.
**Tonight at 6:00 PM EST and Monday, April 13th at 5:00 PM EST** , we’re holding organizing trainings to get our supporters ready for these next 11 weeks. Can you spare one hour to learn how you can help us win in June? **_[If so, please sign up here. If neither time works for you, there are other trainings and volunteer opportunities you can sign up for in the coming weeks.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CgE/ni0YAA/t.30s/dOL8WdRvSL-5n0cwcaGwwA/h1/I3pn4SJUQx-2BiuYuahoeeGnKKu-2BoG4-2BOsx2bcmEQ-2FBUMQBNIvQEjsBJWyDyf6ullkl7P4LTbNnIZowduQa3SRiTxgImcoJesEt5STdBd51jDF0Ou4GRqv0bDJC90WURY7jyhm5w0RzFAsMAwMJHQ2C1XwJn3Sr2s6OCvT8zWqKhdaCBT-2FV4dwcYOZxHRF1YeBvc6LGf2e7KBR3ebvP86PSITfjK8JWK79Kq-2By-2Fg56VMBwG-2BMCsvHZcT2F3xmo5Gy8vHupxr1P6Fb4iNUrTPUYog-3D-3D/1_JO)_**
[Sign up to volunteer >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CgE/ni0YAA/t.30s/dOL8WdRvSL-5n0cwcaGwwA/h2/I3pn4SJUQx-2BiuYuahoeeGnKKu-2BoG4-2BOsx2bcmEQ-2FBUMQBNIvQEjsBJWyDyf6ullkyrKwEUZIM-2BVSDtqS9u5nX5hHKsjVgemE5hTCWVt9D-2BLVudw3pf2kBuE1yxWtOsVuHP-2BF0yMd2mkjWDhWc6h04gSKLHzjZWuXdXF6S5EmoWl8feDEwLD0GVTbP7BRvE4uyvufhw8bTlzB8XTSKiynEUymzgsjb8izoFIH6zqjeiQKspT8D6aOrKRS9zLY7jbGNyHgI6OZ4PvKDeH2vETW9w-3D-3D/7T1T)
From day one, this campaign has been a grassroots movement. We’re not supported by corporate PACs or special interests, and Mondaire isn’t self-funding this race with millions of dollars. We’re a team of hundreds of volunteers ready to get to work to elect a leader who will put working families first. **_[Will you join us?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CgE/ni0YAA/t.30s/dOL8WdRvSL-5n0cwcaGwwA/h3/I3pn4SJUQx-2BiuYuahoeeGnKKu-2BoG4-2BOsx2bcmEQ-2FBUMQBNIvQEjsBJWyDyf6ullkQIXBHpTqfx2A4rBnN5LJXJqtl2APBHlxmDtQwhuWGqBW-2BDTGnIUBbK7FCo3hRAAwuKJndJq52s88kaJ1-2F7z-2FzS8m3PIqfmyNTZoXtgre9OAB59Qe4waLqbCt64AGXGAib8xwTMC-2FWgtX7rRHQHNO3feEmZGzaVyuMhY93CFonvmLbrNKxeBLFpf5TtkxM-2BmIneMwwj9cqt2SaEoX6mU2Aw-3D-3D/y4To)_**
Thank you,
Maya Handa, Digital Organizing Director

subject: The Senate is in play
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:

And to make matters even more concerning, their friends in the mainstream media are going out of their way to promote Colorado as an easy target this November.
**COUNTDOWN TO ELECTION DAY 2020:

That's why I'm asking for support in order to catch up to Schumer and his backing by mega-donor Democrats. My team has authorized 4:1 Matching through 11:59 PM tonight in order to close the gap on the Democrats: == == == == == == (4:1 Match is ACTIVE) It's up to grassroots supporters like you, Friend, to ensure the future of our health care system , Social Security , and the Supreme Court remains in the hands of President Donald Trump and a Republican Senate majority, and NOT under the control of Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and the far-Left socialist Democrats. I need you to take action if we're going to have the resources to continue going toe-to-toe with Chuck Schumer and his handpicked candidate in Iowa. Iowa will be the deciding factor for the Senate majority. Do your part today to ensure Schumer does not buy this seat outright. == \- The Majority is on the line. Thank you, Joni Ernst Paid for by Joni for Iowa PO BOX 93441 Des Moines, IA 50393 | | Joni for Iowa | PO Box 93441, Des Moines, IA 50393 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

subject: Telehealth Plays Big Role in Coronavirus Cure
body:
"As our country responds to the unprecedented coronavirus pandemic, we are working rapidly to change the way we practice medicine to keep..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d4b3b6297&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Telehealth Plays Big Role in Coronavirus Cure **

“As our country responds to the unprecedented coronavirus pandemic, we are working rapidly to change the way we practice medicine to keep people safe,” Surgeon General Jerome Adams and CMS Administrator Seema Verma write in the _Orlando Sentinel_.

“One critical innovation is the use of telehealth, which allows patients to use smartphones, laptops, and other widely available technologies to connect with your healthcare team . . . For the duration of the pandemic, Medicare beneficiaries may now stay at home and use a commonly available interactive form of technology like FaceTime or Skype to have a telehealth office visit.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c58215e637&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump was right this week to sharply criticize the inexcusable conduct of the World Health Organization (WHO) regarding the novel coronavirus pandemic . . . The WHO bears responsibility for helping China spread the coronavirus far beyond China’s borders. What should have been merely a local outbreak that began in China became a worldwide pandemic as a result of the actions of Beijing and the WHO,” Gordon Chang writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c41b22906&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “In the midst of Holy Week, which is also supposed to be the point of peak coronavirus deaths, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo was able to deliver some welcome news”: Over 50,000 U.S. citizens have been safely returned home from more than 90 countries. “This worldwide scale of our repatriation efforts is without parallel in our lifetime,” Secretary Pompeo said. Read more from Fred Lucas in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb5f6d4de7&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The first obligation of every president of the United States since the founding of our nation has always been to protect the American people from harm. President Trump invoked his powers under the Constitution and under laws to do this when he ordered illegal immigrants and asylum seekers to be immediately deported to combat the spread of the coronavirus,” Thomas Homan, former Acting Director of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8bd9b361d7&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6f6010d311&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=affa874822&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c6754544c7)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

clean_body: This morning, the largest Republican PAC in the country announced that they’re investing $43 million into flipping the House red -- and propping up Scott Perry is one of their top priorities. = We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Team -- This morning, the largest Republican PAC in the country announced that they’re investing $43 million into flipping the House red -- and propping up Scott Perry is one of their top priorities. Team, we need our grassroots supporters to step up to help us fight back against Republican special interests and flip PA-10 blue. Can you chip in $5 or more? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Just last month, National Journal named Scott Perry the most vulnerable Republican in Congress , solidifying the race in PA-10 as one of the most competitive in the entire country. We’ve already seen dark money groups pour hundreds of thousands of dollars into this race, and today’s announcement makes it clear: Washington Republicans and special interests are all-in to prop up Scott Perry and maintain the status quo in South Central PA. Team, anything you can chip in right now will help us fight back against this type of outside influence in this race. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. name: Tina Smith
subject: Wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team — As you know, Congress recently passed a bipartisan coronavirus relief package to provide support for families in Minnesota and across the country. It was a much-needed first step, but there is more work to do. Right now, families with children over the age of 16, college students, and adults with disabilities are not included in direct payments from this package. I think that’s wrong, which is why I recently introduced the **All Dependents Count Act** to help these folks get the resources they need during this public health crisis. I’m proud to work to help Minnesotans and families across the country get the relief they need during this difficult time. But I need you with me. **[Will you stand with me to demand Congress expand support for children and their families during this pandemic? Sign my petition today to send a powerful message back to Washington. clean_body: | Team — As you know, Congress recently passed a bipartisan coronavirus relief package to provide support for families in Minnesota and across the country. It was a much-needed first step, but there is more work to do. Right now, families with children over the age of 16, college students, and adults with disabilities are not included in direct payments from this package. I think that’s wrong, which is why I recently introduced the All Dependents Count Act to help these folks get the resources they need during this public health crisis. I’m proud to work to help Minnesotans and families across the country get the relief they need during this difficult time. But I need you with me. | We must fight so everyone has the resources they need to get through this crisis. Thank you, as always, for taking action. Stay safe and healthy. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Allen Chen
subject: Can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Last week Sri was named to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee's Red to Blue list -- a clear indicator that our campaign is now considered one of the best pick-up opportunities in 2020 by Democratic leaders.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FWXNuBpz0HzSTOn6lc1C-MiZ-qZGs3l4Uibwj3bs27g=/MkB8DsSzzyyqGS_wzhlATxQHkiSVqi1GKL50MswiDfA=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.09_AC_b1_all&amount=15)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/FWXNuBpz0HzSTOn6lc1C-MiZ-qZGs3l4Uibwj3bs27g=/WyiuCiabEFfHkOa9RGxHKeZ8n8LGvmYSTPNplW5CQ3s=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.
_
* * *

Team,

Last week Sri was named to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee's Red to Blue list -- a clear indicator that our campaign is now considered one of the best pick-up opportunities in 2020 by Democratic leaders.

Now, we just received news that an outside Republican Super PAC is dumping a $3 million media buy in the greater Houston area, friend.

[**Special interests in Washington are trying to drown out this grassroots movement. And we 're not going to let them. If you're able to, can we count on you to make a donation to help our campaign double down on reaching voters today? **](https://act.myngp.com/el/FWXNuBpz0HzSTOn6lc1C-MiZ-qZGs3l4Uibwj3bs27g=/MeoaS0GD4kiKpkhoiw4s5CgXjX92XFeZemIFiJNjqjo=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.09_AC_b1_all&amount=15) | **[Donate Now ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/FWXNuBpz0HzSTOn6lc1C-MiZ-qZGs3l4Uibwj3bs27g=/MkB8DsSzzyyqGS_wzhlATxQHkiSVqi1GKL50MswiDfA=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.09_AC_b1_all&amount=15)**
---

While Super PACs are eyeing our district, our campaign remains more committed than ever to putting the voices and needs of our community first.

Sri will never stop fighting to ensure that all families have access to life-saving medical care, economic mobility, and a path to achieving the American dream. I see firsthand, every day, his drive to bring true representation to TX-22 and his love for his Houston neighbors.

But this commitment to the well-being of our district's residents is exactly what this outside Super PAC is afraid of, friend.

[**If you can, please donate to our campaign to flip this seat in November and send Sri to Congress.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/FWXNuBpz0HzSTOn6lc1C-MiZ-qZGs3l4Uibwj3bs27g=/MeoaS0GD4kiKpkhoiw4s5CgXjX92XFeZemIFiJNjqjo=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.09_AC_b1_all&amount=15)

Thank you,

Allen Chen
Campaign Manager
Sri for Congress
_ _
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FWXNuBpz0HzSTOn6lc1C-MiZ-qZGs3l4Uibwj3bs27g=/QcDyoqY_ffOq-vNhTxiZ5S-UeoHmsidisO1r21fmrJU=)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/FWXNuBpz0HzSTOn6lc1C-MiZ-qZGs3l4Uibwj3bs27g=/MkB8DsSzzyyqGS_wzhlATxQHkiSVqi1GKL50MswiDfA=?refcode=Em_footer&amount=15)
---
* * *
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at [sri2020.com/](https://act.myngp.com/el/FWXNuBpz0HzSTOn6lc1C-MiZ-qZGs3l4Uibwj3bs27g=/O_asIjN7LBq90q-5aqofXB52AmG093ql-GhxhVhbSCE=)
| Paid for by Sri for Congress
---
SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898

body:
On the ballot to be your next Congresswoman | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/24c537d02b58/calling-all-patriots-12304118?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8be7b15c76&e=795c6d9796)

---
| Peter,

**Yesterday, I[officially filed to be your Congresswoman](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4eea98d925&e=795c6d9796) in Oklahoma’s fifth congressional district!**

I want to be your conservative voice in Washington. I am battle-tested, experienced and we need a conservative voice in Congress now more than ever. Conservatives must continue to stand strong on our faith and Oklahoma values.

It will take all of us to defeat liberal Kendra Horn and the threat she poses for our state and country.

[Join my winning team and let’s be the solution for America!](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2e0f53f47f&e=795c6d9796)
---
|
---
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=007abee0d7&e=795c6d9796)
---
---
| [Video: Why I'm Running](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1a42955c1a&e=795c6d9796 "Video: Why I'm Running")
---
| My family sent me the sweetest selfies to wish me good luck on the big day. The best job is the world is being “Mimi” to all of my grandchildren!

In the meantime, don't forget to check out our new [**Coronavirus Resource Center**.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d0c6bd1b0c&e=795c6d9796) We've got information regarding Small Business Association loans, debt relief, donating blood, food banks and other tips for making it through the COVID-19 pandemic.

I'm looking forward to earning your vote!

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4aef55a6f1&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

P.S. [Please donate $5 or whatever you can to help us stand with President Trump and defeat liberal Democrat Kendra Horn](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=42044bf8c1&e=795c6d9796). Let's win this!

name: Ann Wagner
subject: How far will they go?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ann Wagner for Congress
body:
Once again Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and their liberal allies are showing just how far they are willing to go to push their own radical and out of touch agenda. This is getting old. We all know that the small businesses are the backbone of the American economy, and right now they are suffering - with many headed for bankruptcy.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FKedfofhb9WS5JyDbNSRzPDunSyd8pnUPq7mIkHO7EQog8iYnkR--lQ8TuXr5U6VCvuVtrFOd6iO5bcPGuU38pNmzPNDWtjfNnUWlPTx528U01i6w4WbO-7UMCW4CWXXkqqQFMy7m01YcWgEr94FkJGRYag7SxIZnfW8ZdeoEEuMcyo_ydoPSCDnl-f6YRiR640uVjisM4ExbiP3r-xKTra9IkGQHAgyjnvIVGUoFMPMMSJ8yTjzGPLznucAhskP3o3K2zxNVMbG25j0ACXgoGRQWl4-BMWH1R8t0djJ-Tnfx9E-kcjIZr0udCsdXtqKly5v55RAjZ7Q15zY0NVS1u2tc8K-S2TbmFh1oxs6n8b-IBbuHbMMV0wmaeGxQKn3I7HqM1tpjckBPHAqVjPNng==&c=kqdF3ooOzNxax_4T_4aAv0Lcjzy43snXB8zPz1Vdsb_77p3XFKogag==&ch=TAudPv1SBik12K8nOqNDrr_L-_vysSPwPoZTDpRByI889evBMtRhaw==)

Friend,

Once again Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and their liberal allies are showing just how far they are willing to go to push their own radical and out of touch agenda. _This is getting old._

We all know that the small businesses are the backbone of the American economy, and right now they are suffering - with many headed for bankruptcy. Instead of working with Republicans to ensure that small businesses suffer less and have more resources available to them, the far left is trying another last ditch attempt to add in more money for their own agenda.

If the Democrats have shown us anything these last few weeks, it is that they are completely out of touch with what is truly important - _they are only concerned with maintaining their own power and pushing their own radical agenda._

That's why it is more critical than ever that we take back the House for Republicans. Republicans are putting the needs of Americans first. [**If we want to ensure that small businesses are protected, we must flip the House -- and to do that, we need your help!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FKedfofhb9WS5JyDbNSRzPDunSyd8pnUPq7mIkHO7EQog8iYnkR--lQ8TuXr5U6VCvuVtrFOd6iO5bcPGuU38pNmzPNDWtjfNnUWlPTx528U01i6w4WbO-7UMCW4CWXXkqqQFMy7m01YcWgEr94FkJGRYag7SxIZnfW8ZdeoEEuMcyo_ydoPSCDnl-f6YRiR640uVjisM4ExbiP3r-xKTra9IkGQHAgyjnvIVGUoFMPMMSJ8yTjzGPLznucAhskP3o3K2zxNVMbG25j0ACXgoGRQWl4-BMWH1R8t0djJ-Tnfx9E-kcjIZr0udCsdXtqKly5v55RAjZ7Q15zY0NVS1u2tc8K-S2TbmFh1oxs6n8b-IBbuHbMMV0wmaeGxQKn3I7HqM1tpjckBPHAqVjPNng==&c=kqdF3ooOzNxax_4T_4aAv0Lcjzy43snXB8zPz1Vdsb_77p3XFKogag==&ch=TAudPv1SBik12K8nOqNDrr_L-_vysSPwPoZTDpRByI889evBMtRhaw==)

We're asking**400 American patriots to donate -- even just $1 or $2 -- over the next 48 hours** to help us take back the House. clean_body: Once again Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and their liberal allies are showing just how far they are willing to go to push their own radical and out of touch agenda. This is getting old. We all know that the small businesses are the backbone of the American economy, and right now they are suffering - with many headed for bankruptcy. == == Friend, Once again Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and their liberal allies are showing just how far they are willing to go to push their own radical and out of touch agenda. This is getting old. We all know that the small businesses are the backbone of the American economy, and right now they are suffering - with many headed for bankruptcy. Instead of working with Republicans to ensure that small businesses suffer less and have more resources available to them, the far left is trying another last ditch attempt to add in more money for their own agenda. If the Democrats have shown us anything these last few weeks, it is that they are completely out of touch with what is truly important - they are only concerned with maintaining their own power and pushing their own radical agenda. That's why it is more critical than ever that we take back the House for Republicans. Republicans are putting the needs of Americans first. == We're asking400 American patriots to donate -- even just $1 or $2 -- over the next 48 hours to help us take back the House. == == == == == == == == Time after time, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer have held up important legislation that would help families and small businesses in favor of their own radical agenda. == == Ann Wagner Paid for by Ann Wagner for Congress PO Box 50 Ballwin, MO 63022 == | | Ann Wagner for Congress | PO Box 50, Ballwin, MO 63022 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: GOP Notifications
subject: Hold them accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Drew Ferguson For Congress
body:
While the world grapples with COVID-19, Democrats are trying to take advantage of the situation. Don't let them get away with their political stunts.

Friend,

While the world grapples with COVID-19, Democrats are trying to take advantage of the situation.
* _**First**_ , they were impeaching Trump instead of fighting the public health crisis.

* _**Second**_ , Democrats delayed passage of the financial relief and small business package, the CARES Act, because they tried to sneak in a wish list of Far-left policy priorities.

* _**Then**_ , Pelosi announced the creation of a new partisan House Committee to investigate how the Trump Administration reacted to the COVID-19 crisis.

* _**Now**_ , they are blocking emergency funds for small businesses.

****[Hold Democrats Accountable](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001imzykGWZGIuO-B6NOPQiGhBC47WpOOgNkS7P9K35AaSyKG4WlQnFP1U6j7snLxcByzRPbaxkawDtFmzkIPNLvENaRfe3qXDq9nJMInlrf1wRvW-NVT2uTWWWV1oVGHvjaxESVA6CLGnItprftCtEEHhiZ6sYEMj-Ae656hsFwFiLvo1HdkR88bEZbsngrjmWSgWlAME1_ffZCpUZ9EfTixcVnsQO8tLsgArMtwjDq-RXLUH5iR6m_1PaUZODpgqGe2aUqdOdbgbhzsci2RTkRytS5_bdpGYB4J1D61sJ3iwVDf483-U62zeVySWwiDXQ_ar7XMqFsmSUTuONP4iMxTTBXAl6UoQIWm5SCoVn8-lMNaZp1prkwJ6DsqR1OrgLzSXGRFJ29fU=&c=Dlbvxs8sbuX7OinjHMXoUE8uXw0h9JeP1XN3R3RUaU6rlR4K7VUuhw==&ch=kR-PyPjCmkILZ-IWL8NmQqHjA5Nm3DvVI42-pE3y3NGsKRzuwn3Qmw==)****
Democrats are politicizing the public health crisis and throw temper tantrums if they don't get their way.

Democrats must be held accountable. Don't let them get away with their political stunts.

[**The best way to hold Democrats accountable is to reelect Trump and help Republicans retake the House majority this election cycle.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001imzykGWZGIuO-B6NOPQiGhBC47WpOOgNkS7P9K35AaSyKG4WlQnFP1U6j7snLxcByzRPbaxkawDtFmzkIPNLvENaRfe3qXDq9nJMInlrf1wRvW-NVT2uTWWWV1oVGHvjaxESVA6CLGnItprftCtEEHhiZ6sYEMj-Ae656hsFwFiLvo1HdkR88bEZbsngrjmWSgWlAME1_ffZCpUZ9EfTixcVnsQO8tLsgArMtwjDq-RXLUH5iR6m_1PaUZODpgqGe2aUqdOdbgbhzsci2RTkRytS5_bdpGYB4J1D61sJ3iwVDf483-U62zeVySWwiDXQ_ar7XMqFsmSUTuONP4iMxTTBXAl6UoQIWm5SCoVn8-lMNaZp1prkwJ6DsqR1OrgLzSXGRFJ29fU=&c=Dlbvxs8sbuX7OinjHMXoUE8uXw0h9JeP1XN3R3RUaU6rlR4K7VUuhw==&ch=kR-PyPjCmkILZ-IWL8NmQqHjA5Nm3DvVI42-pE3y3NGsKRzuwn3Qmw==)

Thanks,

GOP Notifications

clean_body: While the world grapples with COVID-19, Democrats are trying to take advantage of the situation. Don't let them get away with their political stunts. Friend, While the world grapples with COVID-19, Democrats are trying to take advantage of the situation. First , they were impeaching Trump instead of fighting the public health crisis. Second , Democrats delayed passage of the financial relief and small business package, the CARES Act, because they tried to sneak in a wish list of Far-left policy priorities. Then , Pelosi announced the creation of a new partisan House Committee to investigate how the Trump Administration reacted to the COVID-19 crisis. Now , they are blocking emergency funds for small businesses. **== Democrats are politicizing the public health crisis and throw temper tantrums if they don't get their way. Democrats must be held accountable. Don't let them get away with their political stunts. == Thanks, GOP Notifications Sent via Drew Ferguson, Chief Deputy Whip ==** Paid for by Drew Ferguson For Congress PO BOX 71067 Newnan, GA 30271 == | | Drew Ferguson for Congress | PO BOX 71067, Newman, GA 30271 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

clean_body: Kendra Horn's victory in 2018 was "the biggest upset of the year," and we must unseat her in November. OK-05 has not had a Democrat in office, so we must return this seat to the conservative leadership we deserve. == You have to see this, Friend... Kendra Horn's team sent an email to her supporters and sounded the alarm. Now, the floodgates have opened and even more out-of-state liberal money is pouring into this race. Horn's victory in 2018 was "the biggest upset of the year," and Friend, we must unseat her in November. In over 40 years, OK-05 has not had a Democrat in office... now it's time to return this seat to the conservative leadership we deserve. == == == == == == Horn is asking her supporters to chip in to defeat me, and we can't let her pull off another victory in November. I know this is a difficult time to fundraise, Friend, but I am counting on you to help me WIN this Fall. Thanks, == Stephanie Bice \---------Forward Message--------- Subject: Eleven opponents up against Kendra From: Paul Begala, == Look, here's all you need to know about Kendra's race and why == 1\. In 2018, Kendra pulled off the biggest upset of the year when she became the first Democrat elected in the district in over 40 years. 2\. Since then, she's been #1 on National Republicans' target list and outside money groups have poured hundreds of thousands of dollars into attacking her. 3\. If that wasn't enough, no fewer than ELEVEN opponents have jumped into the race to try to unseat Kendra. == == Kendra is fighting in Congress to lower prescription drug costs, end the student debt crisis, and make life easier for Oklahoma families. But all of her hard work has made her the #1 target for outside money groups -- and they're all-in to take back this seat. == == == Thank you, Paul Begala == | Paid for by Bice for Congress PO BOX 21315 Oklahoma City, OK 73156 | | Bice for Congress | PO Box 21315, Oklahoma City, OK 73156 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: John Cornyn
subject: Need you
body:
Friend - I just got off of a conference call with my campaign team.
My biggest takeaway: we need at least 400 more Texans to step up and help me defend my campaign from the leftist attacks being levied against us.
It only takes a minute or two, and your contribution - no matter the size - will make all the difference.
Long story short: I need you to be one of the 400 Texans who chip in BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.
I asked my team to make a personalized donate link for you to use, so I can make sure you've been counted.
It's here for your use: **[YOUR LINK](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pWvrsDllSzm2x3JN4UzMDr0A_KKcMqRAVZ7xTOg8ZqBFOgmldx4BG1rPRg1V6Yj4HHwE5KhlMeLy3mp6cN8Ae-J3qjFEMIvlksvr-bQYceUv9mXG14PXzhQ95EmN4cg5hXj1-bH9VTFvyBTQNqktym7NnMYBSO2vVdVgIcmmfnrsJ1YSFZLWfnpUO-o307FZ56nSXiWOKwy9EtVOS2Gpgiaaz7R8v7duCyypSJwvHRplZ4rXbn-TlGzCifDApSaZy4CxNRyZhKLUnKX0QAVFuU8nXWpaLbjjX3HQEWZ_gc_TcWEBIj505xbmpio2RUbQImrwv_h4QPYgwqKbbBc8cChNRcbSq5tgqCSYPUxk3q7RLeoW3Lk2Og==&c=GEoSO4lvELaysSqiBQO6Z9FA35bS0ZGecnVURF6Wc2Lga1qPxAtF0A==&ch=-xZny4Le0VHcxgWlPinil1d6KqxnC3ypYssx4OCYBqHlHAkRVHIjkQ==)**

On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pWvrsDllSzm2x3JN4UzMDr0A_KKcMqRAVZ7xTOg8ZqBFOgmldx4BGzqoS3Gi1BrhL3d6dCaAY5XA9aAVlZxAOefX_WbvLmH0IyavXdGs5TZdhx7WLkqwZqx95FMHE3B9qKE3WCvL7IH42wIkPLpMAStgc5MDCIu72qMJYf10INI=&c=GEoSO4lvELaysSqiBQO6Z9FA35bS0ZGecnVURF6Wc2Lga1qPxAtF0A==&ch=-xZny4Le0VHcxgWlPinil1d6KqxnC3ypYssx4OCYBqHlHAkRVHIjkQ==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pWvrsDllSzm2x3JN4UzMDr0A_KKcMqRAVZ7xTOg8ZqBFOgmldx4BG1rPRg1V6Yj44-uUcva8nhyMrqaCGkJBruoSn_kdzw2KljYdFziRWEMT7wbqmQj7QOLz2F-JV_2UCABAk0jU9j3v7odSgRG0ya8dHhFq8sN_&c=GEoSO4lvELaysSqiBQO6Z9FA35bS0ZGecnVURF6Wc2Lga1qPxAtF0A==&ch=-xZny4Le0VHcxgWlPinil1d6KqxnC3ypYssx4OCYBqHlHAkRVHIjkQ==) \- that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pWvrsDllSzm2x3JN4UzMDr0A_KKcMqRAVZ7xTOg8ZqBFOgmldx4BGwAfLu9Tz9FidScDaoCPz7zT2DRRvTS-xnUGUEi5BzsH_BizpIHXVH3pSgRKRSIpdRYhbtfs6xfPYaj5i3ea_s_sXcnM3DdfWhCNplPoePPGqPjNGqgabSzuOn3CsgugRkvG4abQkOdZEYi6X1Hx4Yus8VOY8Z9yw53EiVOy8mbajXY_8Npm2qx9qFcCDgPm1JQMNkTl0_XnM7Z1-y2DovXY3zE0fcYHFdujB8-dw61hQ-SLkJj7a6c9vbH-3I6j2w==&c=GEoSO4lvELaysSqiBQO6Z9FA35bS0ZGecnVURF6Wc2Lga1qPxAtF0A==&ch=-xZny4Le0VHcxgWlPinil1d6KqxnC3ypYssx4OCYBqHlHAkRVHIjkQ==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Coronavirus FAQs with Senator Bill Cassidy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

As our Nation continues to struggle with the health and economic ramifications of the Coronavirus, it is incredibly important that we listen to our doctors, nurses and other healthcare professionals to do our part to stop the spread of the virus.

That's why I was pleased to be joined yesterday by Senator Bill Cassidy from our neighboring state of Louisiana. Senator Cassidy is not just a United States Senator, but also a medical doctor with decades of experience in public health. Senator Cassidy answered a few frequently asked questions about the Coronavirus, as well as the economic relief package passed by Congress and signed by President Trump.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=9c83587e801c4e2786c1634d43327827&_e=gHvKhYK6lS505VmFcqvXG2h_dkqJOzAte5gwrQjDIJ1qrQUkSCoTttyHRDorkVPmfeXeYeo9K4Ds7nlVLl6URAf0pEk1uJAc-lNWckrPlnRkoKCX_gUKMpmbMQ92sCopgLUM1OSoeEerk2A2qHrGUoV3A9h15stIEqyL51kjZfPpAFhneeLnic4_Oj97cbrxU64FWZOI2biQMazPG2xMYh9GSYyLlx_Gk3-PJH_lL7JogiB9ik7seOCQ42hNb6cIGDLA5ZkUlF5VjM8hWaLk-A%3D%3D)

name: Team Booker
subject: Sign now: A universal basic income for all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
We need to do something about this: 1 in 10 workers have now lost their jobs.
#
This is a crisis.
Recent reports are now showing that 16.8 million unemployment claims have been filed between March 15 and April 4. (Yes, you read that right.)
To put this in perspective, **this means 1 in 10 workers have now lost their jobs, their livelihoods.**
We need relief. We need healthcare. And we need a universal basic income for all. People are worth more than their hourly wage, which is why Charles supports a universal basic income.
**[Will you stand with him today and sign our petition in favor of a universal basic income?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17081422/182095766/-1005359193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTk4OTlhNS1hZDdhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YVHho2jZPsTWgaJFS2-ZkCRI5D6jE8oJL5NJyf2Y-eE=&emci=f37c6c88-a67a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=859899a5-ad7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**
****[Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17081423/182095767/-1005359193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTk4OTlhNS1hZDdhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YVHho2jZPsTWgaJFS2-ZkCRI5D6jE8oJL5NJyf2Y-eE=&emci=f37c6c88-a67a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=859899a5-ad7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)****
The recently-passed coronavirus relief package promised a one-time payment of $1,200 to taxpayers who make under $99,000. **When 10% of the workforce is out of a job, a one-time payment of $1,200 simply isn’t enough for most Americans to make rent, pay bills, and ensure ends are met.**
Even after this pandemic, though, a universal basic income will strengthen our entire economy by allowing people to cover their needs, shop at local businesses, invest in their future, or even open a business of their own. By creating the opportunity for ownership, a basic income offers the opportunity to break the cycle of generational poverty.
In Kentucky, specifically, it will provide Kentuckians the financial means, dignity, and autonomy to make decisions to better their lives.
**[So: can you join us today in demanding Congress to institute universal basic income now? It only takes a few seconds to add your name here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17081425/182095769/-1005359193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTk4OTlhNS1hZDdhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YVHho2jZPsTWgaJFS2-ZkCRI5D6jE8oJL5NJyf2Y-eE=&emci=f37c6c88-a67a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=859899a5-ad7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**
****[Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17081427/182095771/-1005359193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTk4OTlhNS1hZDdhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YVHho2jZPsTWgaJFS2-ZkCRI5D6jE8oJL5NJyf2Y-eE=&emci=f37c6c88-a67a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=859899a5-ad7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)****
Thank you for being a part of this movement.
Onward,
Team Booker
PS: For more information on Charles Booker's support for a universal basic income, **[read his guest editorial in the Louisville Courier-Journal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17081429/182095773/1511506915?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTk4OTlhNS1hZDdhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YVHho2jZPsTWgaJFS2-ZkCRI5D6jE8oJL5NJyf2Y-eE=&emci=f37c6c88-a67a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=859899a5-ad7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**

clean_body: We need to do something about this: 1 in 10 workers have now lost their jobs. This is a crisis. Recent reports are now showing that 16.8 million unemployment claims have been filed between March 15 and April 4. (Yes, you read that right.) To put this in perspective, this means 1 in 10 workers have now lost their jobs, their livelihoods. We need relief. We need healthcare. And we need a universal basic income for all. People are worth more than their hourly wage, which is why Charles supports a universal basic income. ** The recently-passed coronavirus relief package promised a one-time payment of $1,200 to taxpayers who make under $99,000. When 10% of the workforce is out of a job, a one-time payment of $1,200 simply isn’t enough for most Americans to make rent, pay bills, and ensure ends are met. Even after this pandemic, though, a universal basic income will strengthen our entire economy by allowing people to cover their needs, shop at local businesses, invest in their future, or even open a business of their own. By creating the opportunity for ownership, a basic income offers the opportunity to break the cycle of generational poverty. In Kentucky, specifically, it will provide Kentuckians the financial means, dignity, and autonomy to make decisions to better their lives. Thank you for being a part of this movement. Onward, Team Booker PS: For more information on Charles Booker's support for a universal basic income, =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Greg Stanton
subject: During this difficult time, will you join me in supporting some important non-profits?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
As our community is currently fighting to persevere through this unprecedented COVID-19 public health crisis and economic fallout, I am calling for folks in our community with the resources to do so, to step up and join me in supporting our most vulnerable during this time.

**Among other organizations I am contributing to right now, I am making donations to support Meals on Wheels and the Restaurant Workers ' Community Foundation.**

Meals on Wheels does an invaluable service to our community in providing meals to those who do not have the financial means to afford them for their families, which is invaluable during this time of public health concern and economic difficulty for many here in Arizona.

The Restaurant Workers' Community Foundation has stepped up to support local small businesses, their employees, and those in their communities during this time of social distancing, which has really hurt the business of local restaurants and bars here, which are the backbones of our local communities.

[**Will you chip in here to join me in splitting a tax-deductible charitable contribution between Meals on Wheels and The Restaurant Workers ' Community Foundation?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WOJ1xWO_C-KWstUXgu3PFqkSx8B4yRvKXyuW-B4Ebzg=/0VqCBDRJjhwUIUivWInaX_3TYulRCKZsBO8cyhV6Qhs=?refcode=X_040820_NonProfits_A&amount=25&recurring=auto)

_Charitable contributions made using this form will be split evenly between Meals on Wheels and The Restaurant Workers ' Community Foundation._

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/WOJ1xWO_C-KWstUXgu3PFqkSx8B4yRvKXyuW-B4Ebzg=/0VqCBDRJjhwUIUivWInaX_3TYulRCKZsBO8cyhV6Qhs=?refcode=X_040820_NonProfits_A&amount=5&recurring=auto)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/WOJ1xWO_C-KWstUXgu3PFqkSx8B4yRvKXyuW-B4Ebzg=/0VqCBDRJjhwUIUivWInaX_3TYulRCKZsBO8cyhV6Qhs=?refcode=X_040820_NonProfits_A&amount=50&recurring=auto)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/WOJ1xWO_C-KWstUXgu3PFqkSx8B4yRvKXyuW-B4Ebzg=/0VqCBDRJjhwUIUivWInaX_3TYulRCKZsBO8cyhV6Qhs=?refcode=X_040820_NonProfits_A&amount=100&recurring=auto)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/WOJ1xWO_C-KWstUXgu3PFqkSx8B4yRvKXyuW-B4Ebzg=/0VqCBDRJjhwUIUivWInaX_3TYulRCKZsBO8cyhV6Qhs=?refcode=X_040820_NonProfits_A&amount=250&recurring=auto)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/WOJ1xWO_C-KWstUXgu3PFqkSx8B4yRvKXyuW-B4Ebzg=/0VqCBDRJjhwUIUivWInaX_3TYulRCKZsBO8cyhV6Qhs=?refcode=X_040820_NonProfits_A&recurring=auto)

There are so many other organizations that need our help during this time and I encourage you to show your support for them too.

Together, we will get through this difficult time as a strong and unified Arizona community.

\-- _Greg Stanton_

name: Team Collins
subject: Sen. Schumer blocks MORE relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Senate Democrats, led by Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, have yet again blocked critical relief funding for Americans that need it most. The proposed legislation would give an additional $250 billion dollars in relief to small businesses across Maine and the country... and Chuck Schumer just BLOCKED it from passing.
Friend -- just when you think Chuck Schumer couldn't get more partisan... he does THIS:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eRTBHqY4NE-TJzfvybEj0r9tcmXWlb0p8kmuZxxFnTCBwDoDlbNzACjnUJRaDSvmbpDrYIttQPRX1vJCeHJFPE8uSMlFLa_pUK_l03HBR8bkF5sjymfmiOVTYu51NpAex-_IUF2lWnM8K6ieSvkK9rCI2CeR8DW6ZZIGu-3xwj0GBP_ft7mtSmv3ngDeeWQcvzl-gGC7PVCwy36nVkXjceBaTYxfgsyxSKpp5AZ2EHxbpBlLNPcRYL98fjrAp7nv6Ofxyg2QHgSjvnW7SfcNF30h7R7oR3UemG5TQDbgLlX16X7XkaSE8zHqqoydGcjVmVow5dRQy1ZEkK4qlJ7iAudOcLzLTiXooigZ2kK7Y7NNz2xdTFVKDawuNsmpkMPa&c=8lgCtgd4NWKxpK8JxVzKsUCHAYFa8OPFRXsu-fDFE9KbPGEBpdFMYg==&ch=VmVk0WE-o3MyFKHtnvfTSATS_xUZ1BZEOVTrjBQP1m8cCcQ6smULHA==)
Yes, you read that right. Senate Democrats, led by Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, have _yet again_ blocked critical relief funding for Americans that need it most. The proposed legislation would give an additional $250 billion dollars in relief to small businesses across Maine and the country... and Chuck Schumer just BLOCKED it from passing.
This behavior from Senator Schumer is mind-blowing. There is no explanation for why he is standing in the way of getting more relief for Americans that need it. All Senator Schumer cares about is his **blatant partisan games.**
[CHIP IN TO STOP SCHUMER'S PARTISAN GAMES!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eRTBHqY4NE-TJzfvybEj0r9tcmXWlb0p8kmuZxxFnTCBwDoDlbNzACjnUJRaDSvmbpDrYIttQPRX1vJCeHJFPE8uSMlFLa_pUK_l03HBR8bkF5sjymfmiOVTYu51NpAex-_IUF2lWnM8K6ieSvkK9rCI2CeR8DW6ZZIGu-3xwj0GBP_ft7mtSmv3ngDeeWQcvzl-gGC7PVCwy36nVkXjceBaTYxfgsyxSKpp5AZ2EHxbpBlLNPcRYL98fjrAp7nv6Ofxyg2QHgSjvnW7SfcNF30h7R7oR3UemG5TQDbgLlX16X7XkaSE8zHqqoydGcjVmVow5dRQy1ZEkK4qlJ7iAudOcLzLTiXooigZ2kK7Y7NNz2xdTFVKDawuNsmpkMPa&c=8lgCtgd4NWKxpK8JxVzKsUCHAYFa8OPFRXsu-fDFE9KbPGEBpdFMYg==&ch=VmVk0WE-o3MyFKHtnvfTSATS_xUZ1BZEOVTrjBQP1m8cCcQ6smULHA==)
---

Susan worked tirelessly to get this relief to small businesses across the country. Now, Senator Schumer and his allies are blocking this relief for political purposes. We simply cannot let him get away with this. [**Contribute anything you can today to Susan 's campaign and help put an end to Chuck Schumer's ridiculous behavior >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eRTBHqY4NE-TJzfvybEj0r9tcmXWlb0p8kmuZxxFnTCBwDoDlbNzACjnUJRaDSvmbpDrYIttQPRX1vJCeHJFPE8uSMlFLa_pUK_l03HBR8bkF5sjymfmiOVTYu51NpAex-_IUF2lWnM8K6ieSvkK9rCI2CeR8DW6ZZIGu-3xwj0GBP_ft7mtSmv3ngDeeWQcvzl-gGC7PVCwy36nVkXjceBaTYxfgsyxSKpp5AZ2EHxbpBlLNPcRYL98fjrAp7nv6Ofxyg2QHgSjvnW7SfcNF30h7R7oR3UemG5TQDbgLlX16X7XkaSE8zHqqoydGcjVmVow5dRQy1ZEkK4qlJ7iAudOcLzLTiXooigZ2kK7Y7NNz2xdTFVKDawuNsmpkMPa&c=8lgCtgd4NWKxpK8JxVzKsUCHAYFa8OPFRXsu-fDFE9KbPGEBpdFMYg==&ch=VmVk0WE-o3MyFKHtnvfTSATS_xUZ1BZEOVTrjBQP1m8cCcQ6smULHA==)
In Susan's many years in the Senate, she has never seen it like this before. In the midst of a global pandemic, Senator Schumer and his far left allies have chosen politics over helping the American people.**We cannot let them win.**
Thank you for standing with Susan!
-Team Collins

| | Peter --

Larry Sabato's Crystal Ball -- a highly respected electoral analyst -- **just officially moved our race from _Lean Democratic_ to a _Toss-Up_ for the Special Election on May 12th.**

It confirmed what we already knew. This is going to be an incredibly tough race, and we have no time to lose.

**[Too much is at stake -- ballots start arriving in voters' mailboxes in just a few days, and we have to get our message to them. name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Showing up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

While our
food banks are struggling to feed every person in need due to COVID-19,
this team is showing up.

So far, we’ve raised $30,000 for the food bank in El Paso. Now we’re
setting our sights higher. We’re hoping to get to $50,000 in the next 48
hours. It’s going to be a stretch, but it’s important to try.

We don’t want to see any of the $1 million matching grant go to waste –
not when so many of our fellow Americans are unemployed and struggling to
feed their families.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42431?refcode=ema20200409-84810&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=84810%2E444211%2EbENyuT ]Today, we’re asking you to make a donation to fuel the El Paso food
bank’s efforts. Every donation will be matched, dollar-for-dollar. So if
you give right now, your impact will be doubled.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42431?refcode=ema20200409-84810&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=84810%2E444211%2EbENyuT ]Contribute (2X Match)

The crisis we’re facing is unprecedented, and the food bank needs a huge
deal of resources to feed every person in need.

Fortunately, the Paul Foster Foundation and Woody and Gayle Hunt
Foundation have pledged to match every donation – up to $1 million. But
it’s up to us to do our part.

If everyone reading this email donated just $3, we’d meet our goal in
seconds. The truth is most people look the other way. So we’re counting on
you.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42431?refcode=ema20200409-84810&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=84810%2E444211%2EbENyuT ]Help us meet our $50,000 goal for the El Paso food bank. Please donate
what you can – before the next 48 hours are up.

If you can’t afford to give right now, please don’t worry. If you’re able
to donate, we need you now.

Thank you so much,

The Powered by People team

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42431?refcode=ema20200409-84810&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=84810%2E444211%2EbENyuT ]Contribute (2X Match)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=84810%2E444211%2EbENyuT

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: Can I have a moment of your time?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

As you know, last month, the COVID-19 pandemic came to Kansas and quickly spread across our state - touching every single county. This has been an unprecedented and challenging time for all of us.

As Mayor of Topeka, I am focused on ensuring our city is prepared to manage this national health crisis. Despite these extraordinary challenges, our campaign for Congress did not waiver. I am so grateful for the countless volunteers who worked hard to ensure that our campaign pressed on.

I have to admit, with everything going on in the world, I wasn’t sure whether we could meet our fundraising deadline. However, all of _you_ , our partners, stepped up in an incredible way. Even during these difficulties, Kansas said...
**WE. WANT. CHANGE.**
To all of you who made contributions, called your friends, posted about the campaign on social media, and rallied to answer the call - **THANK YOU!** We not only met, but **EXCEEDED** our 1st Quarter fundraising goal!

We hear your voices, and we are energized to carry this momentum into November as we take this seat and bring compassionate, competent leadership to the 2nd District of Kansas.

Thank you for standing with me,

Michelle

PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
Michelle for Kansas
PO Box 67101
Topeka, KS 66667

Text 'KANSAS' to 31996 to get updates and stay involved in the campaign.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/be5e2d9f-977a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8/c409ba5e-ba7a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA5YmE1ZS1iYTdhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyYVTmOghuzW0xt1fTigCf19sw9Q-mQT6kNIjLEhEIc=&id=111940568&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

clean_body: | Here’s the hard truth, folks — Our traditional and grassroots fundraising has really slowed down in the last few weeks for obvious reasons. We expected this. We’re facing an unprecedented pandemic that has impacted every aspect of our society. Our campaign is no exception. Canceling our in-person fundraisers and asking our team to work from home for the foreseeable future has fundamentally reshaped our operation, which is why our campaign manager is sitting down with John tomorrow to go over every item in our budget with a fine-toothed comb. This means grassroots donations are more important than ever to building the kind of campaign we need to win this race. If you’re financially able, please consider pitching in today to help elect John and flip this seat blue: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = What’s more, all of this big change comes just as Mitch McConnell’s super PAC allies announced they would spend $67 million in advertising in key Senate races across the country. | Dear Friend,

Today, the Barbara Bollier-Chuck Schumer socialist agenda took center stage as Democrats blocked funding for small business employers to meet their payrolls. Their action forces the Payroll Protection Program to be zeroed out in days, **_putting millions more_ ****Americans in the unemployment line. **

**Democrat Bollier's smug silence as her pal Schumer attacks American families is a deafening elitist endorsement of her party's continued war on American prosperity.**

**I am the only consistent conservative businessman in the race for U.S. Senate**. We can rebuild our economy, _but only if we send the right leaders with the right experience to get the job done_** _._ **

_America prospers when we put Americans first_ , fostering an economic climate allowing our families, our entrepreneurs, our innovators, to all reach their full potential.

**Will you join me to restore a prosperous America?** Your support today is the difference between an American path to prosperity or heading down the Bollier-Schumer road to poverty.
