clean_body: I wanted to quickly bump up Lisa’s last email to the top of your inbox. We need you to know the severity as to what is happening right now. Peter, I wanted to quickly bump up Lisa’s last email to the top of your inbox. We need you to know the severity as to what is happening right now. Here’s another headline for you, if the last one didn’t shock you enough: $51 million dollars to defend Far-Left Susan Wild. Peter, the Left doesn’t care about your conservative values, the 2nd Amendment, and securing our borders. They want the exact opposite: They want our guns taken away, to strip down our border wall to let people freely come in from the southern border, and much more. Thanks for your support, and for seeing that the Lehigh Valley will be represented by someone who makes YOUR values and concerns their priority. Alex Team Scheller \------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, Did you see the headline? Nancy Pelosi, the Far-Left Speaker of the House of Representatives, is taking out over $50 million in television ads--including $6 million in our very own district. She’s throwing her support and money behind her biggest ally: Susan Wild. These aren’t just pennies either, Peter. Nancy is throwing MILLIONS behind trying to save my opponent. Nancy’s eyes are set on keeping a Democratic majority, serving selfish ambition without thinking of constituents first. Peter, that will never be me. I am committed to defending and protecting your conservative values, your constitutional rights, and the things that matter most to you and our Lehigh Valley neighbors. Our community, now more than ever, needs a grassroots, conservative fighter. Someone who isn’t bolstered from coastal-elite dollars. This isn’t the time where we can just slack off. Team Scheller -- Your support and contributions mean more than ever right now. We can’t back down from this fight. We must continue and finish strong, all the way across the line in November when we unseat Susan Wild. Peter, can I count on you to chip in BIG RIGHT NOW? Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Kathy Manning
subject: This crisis requires immediate action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
And this is an important step we need to take now ->
|
---

| | This is unacceptable -- we're in the midst of a global health pandemic, but the Trump Administration refuses to reopen Affordable Care Act enrollment so uninsured Americans can sign up for coverage and get the care they need. More than 30 million Americans are uninsured, and more than 6.6 million Americans have filed for unemployment in the wake of the coronavirus outbreak. For many, that means they are now without coverage, too. **This is a crisis, and it calls for immediate action. Reopening ACA enrollment is an important step we need to take to make sure millions of American can access care if they get sick.** [_**Will you add your name to mine and call on the Trump Administration and Republicans to stop their attacks on health care and reopen ACA enrollment for Americans in need? We need 5,000 signatures before midnight tonight.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d373/3d199a51/2f7872cc/7364f30a/3866322087/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200409p_m") Americans are afraid of not being able to afford their medical bills. And rightfully so -- the average cost for treatment for the coronavirus could add up to more than $20,000. I understand their fears. When my youngest daughter was diagnosed with a chronic illness, our insurance company refused to cover the medication she needed and said it would cost us $10,000 per month out of pocket. [_**No family should have to go through that -- we need to make sure everyone can access the health care they need. Will you be one of the 5,000 grassroots supporters to sign our petition before midnight?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d373/3d199a51/2f7872cc/7364f30a/3866322087/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200409p_m") Thank you, Kathy |
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

subject: Sen. Schumer blocks MORE relief

body:
Senate Democrats, led by Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, have yet again blocked critical relief funding for Americans that need it most. The proposed legislation would give an additional $250 billion dollars in relief to small businesses across Maine and the country... and Chuck Schumer just BLOCKED it from passing.

Tina is working her tail off every single day — for the working folks in Minnesota and those across the country. Here’s a quick rundown of what she fought for in the bipartisan coronavirus relief package:
* Ensured private insurance plans cover a COVID-19 vaccine without cost-sharing when it becomes available;
* Put in place measures that would prevent drug shortages and protect our medical supply chain;
* Helped secure $3.5 billion in additional funding for child care assistance for frontline workers and made sure we are supporting our rural and telehealth programs;
* And Tina helped secure more than $9 billion in critical funding for tribes and the Indian Health Service.

Tina is working her heart out in the Senate to do right by the people of Minnesota and folks across the country, but she cannot walk this path alone.
**If it makes sense for you financially, can you add a donation of any amount to support Tina’s work in the Senate? Anything you can give today will make a meaningful difference. Thank you in advance.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: We need leadership for working families
body:
The new unemployment numbers just came in, and one thing is clear: we need leaders who care about the working class now more than ever. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f87fa3fa3689/we-need-leadership-for-working-families?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| _In this time of economic uncertainty, we fully understand if you cannot afford to donate right now. We are grateful to have you on our side. Stay safe and healthy while we get through this together_
---
| |
#
17 million people have filed for unemployment in the last 3 weeks. And those are just the ones who have been able to file.

The economic instability caused by COVID-19 has highlighted the need for real, bold leadership at all levels of government.

**We need a new economic relief bill for the working class** that includes additional individual payments, an extension of increased unemployment benefits, and more money for small business loans to keep workers on the payroll.

**We need a national mortgage and rent freeze during this crisis** , in addition to the federal government picking up the COBRA costs for the remainder of the pandemic. Unfortunately, these bold and necessary actions are not likely to happen when people like Adam Kinzinger are in office. Congressman Kinzinger prefers corporate bailouts, not helping out the working class.

Illinois' 16th district can't afford to be represented by Adam Kinzinger any longer.

You can count on me to fight for and to represent the working class in Congress.

If you can, [please chip in to help us get our message out to the voters of IL-16](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=cafe4e65b1&e=140a9b81e7)

Solidarity,

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: I need you to know these 3 things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Now more than ever, we need clear-eyed, moral leadership in Washington, and that's why I'm running for U.S. Senate.
| | |
---
Friend, there are three things I need you to know about this race:
* Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats CAN take back the Senate, and it could all come down to Georgia.
* My wealthy Republican opponent is spending $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to buy this seat - and the GOP has named me a top target.
* Our campaign is fueled by grassroots donations, but we still need to raise $10,968 by midnight to stay on track to hit our monthly goal.

I'm running for Senate to flip Georgia blue and end Mitch McConnell's majority once and for all - but I can't win without you, friend. Please, with so much on the line in this election, **can you give $5 or more now to help us win in Georgia and take back the Senate? **

Friend,

For the last couple of weeks, we’ve been sharing incredible community stories about how we’re all in this together.

We’ve seen an overwhelming outpouring of amazing stories since we started sharing them on our social media accounts and we’ve been moved by the sacrifices that we’re seeing from Hoosiers all across our state.

_So this week, we’re asking you to share the stories of the heroes in your community — the nurses, the doctors, the frontline workers — anyone who’s making a huge difference in our fight against the coronavirus._

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Amid a pandemic, Voice of America spends your money to promote foreign propaganda
body:
Voice of America is a global news network funded by American taxpayers. It spends about $200 million each year on its mission to... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f0b179dc99&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 9, 2020
---
| | |
# **Voice of America spends your money to speak for authoritarian regimes**

**Voice of America** is a global news network funded by American taxpayers. It spends about $200 million each year on its mission to “tell America’s story” and “present the policies of the United States clearly and effectively” to people around the globe.

**Today, however** , VOA too often speaks for America’s adversaries—not its citizens.

**The Coronavirus pandemic** is no exception. Secrecy from the Communist Party of China allowed the deadly virus to spread across the world.

**Journalists should report** the facts, but VOA has instead amplified Beijing’s propaganda. This week, VOA called China’s Wuhan lockdown a successful “model” copied by much of the world—and then [tweeted out video](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d35c414c9d&e=3ee4985eea) of the Communist government’s celebratory light show marking the quarantine’s alleged end.

**Even worse,** while much of the U.S. media takes its lead from China, VOA went one step further: It created graphics with [Communist government statistics](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e096fddbd1&e=3ee4985eea) to compare China’s Coronavirus death toll to America’s. As intelligence experts point out, there is simply no way to verify the accuracy of China’s numbers.

**The Coronavirus story** is just one example of this pattern. Last year, VOA helped highlight the Twitter feed of Iran Foreign Minister Javad Zarif while he was [issuing threats against the U.S.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d12c70d25f&e=3ee4985eea) and sharing Russian anti-U.S. propaganda videos.

**“VOA will represent America,”** its guiding Charter reads. And for years after its founding during World War II, VOA served that mission by promoting freedom and democracy across the world for audiences who longed for both.

**Today,** **VOA** is promoting propaganda instead—and your tax dollars are paying for it.
---
|
---
|
## **🎬****WATCH: The First Lady’s message to frontline responders**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e873f60435&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **The biggest heroes** during our national Coronavirus response are America’s healthcare workers and frontline responders. First Lady Melania Trump recorded a video message thanking them this week on behalf of a grateful nation.

**“The President and I** appreciate all that you are doing to keep the people of our country healthy and safe,” Mrs. Trump said. “In the most difficult of times, the United States never fails to rise to the occasion with both unity and strength.”

**“It is because of you,** that the people of America are receiving the care and treatment they need.”

**President Trump** is fighting to make sure these workers have the support they need, as well. The CARES Act, which he signed into law last month, provides $100 billion for hospitals and healthcare providers. FEMA and its partners, meanwhile, continue to work with states to distribute ventilators and other equipment across the country.

🎬 [Watch LIVE at 5 p.m. ET: President Trump leads Coronavirus briefing](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=61a880bd10&e=3ee4985eea)

subject: ALERT: Still time to request your absentee ballot for Ohio’s primary election!

body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDIyMjc5MzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTc0MTA1MjcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Did you know that you can still vote-by-mail for Ohio's primary?
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIyMjc5MzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTA1MjcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDIyMjc5MzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTA1MjcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
_**Did you know that you can still vote-by-mail for Ohio 's primary?**_ If you have not yet requested your absentee ballot and would like to vote-by-mail then please follow the below instructions or [**fill out your own absentee ballot request here!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDIyMjc5MzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTA1MjcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
1\. **Write:** "I'm a qualified elector and I'm requesting an absentee ballot for the March 17th Ohio Primary."
2\. **List your:**
* Full Name
* Date of Birth
* County
* Registration Address
* Mailing Address (if different from your registration address)
* Ohio driver's license number OR last four digits of your Social Security number OR include a COPY of an acceptable form of ID
* Indicate the type of ballot you want: Democratic, Republican, Libertarian or Issues only ballot (choose one)

3\. **Sign and date your letter.**
Thank you,

Rob, Team Turner
PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
---

Friend,

With America in crisis, President Trump and conservatives in Congress have worked hard to prioritize solutions, provide relief, and support our small businesses.

Nancy Pelosi and her pals, like our own Anthony Brindisi have been using this same time to push their unpopular, radical agenda.

They’re out there promoting things like the green new deal, demanding reparations and tax cuts for their millionaire pals. They’re calling for “crimes against humanity” charges against President Trump.

We know Anthony Brindisi won’t stand up to this madness - so it’s time to send our own message on behalf of the people of NY-22: **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.**
[ **ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition >>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=15d93b2d5c6a43649c701e173d34732b&_e=vxvyq21MWVxBjPmko6ZB0ZKPcl8W9ucdnhRXMS7YIm53IiKX-uIvSqU3r1gE0vUieeMFURIgxDGuJ6vWSBlDj5B2Duh1knB96fpZaNLMCCwJZfxValL0I3niRSDkDuilqUzMIeYI6vpx2M4fvFa8QlSzopJlPl9RdKem0pyk8xkvvEWukiBTvb6hPl7Qj_CwFiQHRuSssjCnqoC8Ot_t65GQnju6r787MfkIJv9qcoY8L4xSG4tim2vRll3Hjrw3FXzK5n97XX2JHyCDFxi19yuKrr0ZsOlYEgbo3puJb7l1Wf6qvtUwut4DknxPDo327kcTov8QX8MeZQ9a4-F1i0Mqe9WecHw6oOdvOYw4LQLIZ4LWWOJlunjwop5BueBSG9ccgvOZSFegQ8M0RRDVjOgequTaoyxLB5opGGQKUv7lM4NJvV0nAJpV2FH3ftnVsSHscMrfLjLJk0o7MGRlnWMeGUuNhblN89SS5koprU0%3D)
Friend, the obstruction we’ve seen from liberals in Congress is truly unprecedented.

This is NOT the time for radical tactics and partisan policies. Our families and our business are at stake! Our hospitals and health providers are fearing the worst and our small businesses are struggling.

**There is NO EXCUSE for pushing these unpopular Democrat priorities when people are truly suffering. **

In the state of New York, we're dealing with nearly 125,000 cases of Coronavirus and millions of dollars lost for business.

Let’s tell Nancy Pelosi, Anthony Brindisi, and liberals in Congress that we’ve had enough of the partisan games. It’s time to help the people.

clean_body: in times of crisis, we fight together. ALERT: Radical liberals in Congress are more focused on their unpopular pet projects than helping YOU. Join me to say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH - it’s time to get to work! | | Friend, With America in crisis, President Trump and conservatives in Congress have worked hard to prioritize solutions, provide relief, and support our small businesses. Nancy Pelosi and her pals, like our own Anthony Brindisi have been using this same time to push their unpopular, radical agenda. They’re out there promoting things like the green new deal, demanding reparations and tax cuts for their millionaire pals. They’re calling for “crimes against humanity” charges against President Trump. We know Anthony Brindisi won’t stand up to this madness - so it’s time to send our own message on behalf of the people of NY-22: ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. Friend, the obstruction we’ve seen from liberals in Congress is truly unprecedented. This is NOT the time for radical tactics and partisan policies. Our families and our business are at stake! Our hospitals and health providers are fearing the worst and our small businesses are struggling. There is NO EXCUSE for pushing these unpopular Democrat priorities when people are truly suffering. In the state of New York, we're dealing with nearly 125,000 cases of Coronavirus and millions of dollars lost for business. Let’s tell Nancy Pelosi, Anthony Brindisi, and liberals in Congress that we’ve had enough of the partisan games. It’s time to help the people.
